title: Keybind Cheatsheet
source_warning: Some configuration files could not be read.
missing_config: The configured keybind file could not be read.
hyprctl_missing: hyprctl is required for Hyprland Lua keybindings.
hyprctl_failed: Hyprland did not return its active keybindings.

compositor.label: Compositor
compositor.description: Detect the active compositor or force a parser.

mango_config.label: Mango config
mango_config.description: Main Mango configuration file. Source directives are followed.

hyprland_lua_config.label: Hyprland Lua config
hyprland_lua_config.description: Lua configuration used to recover categories for live binds.

hyprland_parser.label: Hyprland parser
hyprland_parser.description: Use the live Lua bind list, classic config, or automatic detection.

niri_config.label: Niri config
niri_config.description: Main Niri KDL configuration file. Include directives are followed.

columns.label: Columns
columns.description: Maximum number of balanced columns in the panel.

show_undescribed.label: Show undescribed bindings
show_undescribed.description: Put bindings without descriptions in a separate section.

show_actions.label: Show actions
show_actions.description: Show compositor commands below binding descriptions.
